features: 【4096 Levels Pressure Sensitivity】-With unparalleled pressure sensitivity, each stroke reflects the subtlest variances in force, mimicking traditional drawing techniques, delivers a responsive and realistic writing and drawing experience, providing intricate details and shading options.（𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗘𝗠𝗥 𝘀𝘁𝘆𝗹𝘂𝘀 𝗶𝘀 𝗻𝗼𝘁 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗹𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲𝘀.）

【Exact Eraser Function】-Featuring a precise eraser function for Effortlessly correct mistakes , our stylus pen lets you erase with the same accuracy and finesse as writing, providing a natural and efficient digital note-taking and sketching experience.

【Palm Rejection & Tilt Support】-The WIILGN Stylus Pen is ergonomically designed, this stylus pen offers palm rejection and tilt support, allowing you to write and draw naturally, allowing for comfortable hand placement at any angle. It uses EMR technology, providing a smooth and lag-free writing experience.

【5 Replaceable Pen Tips】-Customize your writing style with 5 interchangeable pen tips, each offering distinct textures for a personalized digital artistry experience. Make the product last longer, no longer worry about not having replacement parts after damage.

【Stylish Magnetic Design】-WIILGN’s stylus pen seamlessly attaches to your device via magnetic adsorption, ensuring it stays securely within reach whenever inspiration strikes, convenient storage and quick access whenever you need it.

【Battery-Free & Any-Angle Writing】-Unlike many digital pens, WIILGN’s stylus pen doesn’t require charging, ensuring uninterrupted use. Write or draw at any angle without worrying about power interruptions.The stylus can be used at writing angles from 30° to 90°.

【Versatile for Digital Notebooks】-Ideal for students, painting professionals, office workers, and artists, this stylus pen enhances your digital notebook experience. Use seamlessly various like reMarkable 2/1 tablet, Kindle Scribe, Galaxy Book, Boox Note Tablet, Galaxy Tab S6/S7/S8. （𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗘𝗠𝗥 𝘀𝘁𝘆𝗹𝘂𝘀 𝗶𝘀 𝗻𝗼𝘁 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗹𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲𝘀.）

【Make You Satisfied】-We are committed to providing customers with the best products and services. If you are not completely satisfied with the product you purchased, feel free to ask us and we will provide you with a good shopping experience.
The EMR stylus is not compatible with Apple devices.
description: Product Description Erasable Magnetic Stylus Pen for Remarkable Pen --Are you tired of dealing with flimsy styluses that break at the slightest mishandling? --Have you ever wished for a capacitive pen that not only lasts but also comes with an eraser, allowing you to edit your digital creations with the same ease as if you were using paper and pencil? --Look no further because Magnetic Stylus Pen is here to revolutionize your digital writing and drawing experience. Transform your digital experience with our EMR Stylus Pen, specially designed for users. --This advanced EMR (Electro-Magnetic Resonance) stylus offers unparalleled precision and functionality,setting new standards in digital pentechnology. --Its sturdy construction means it can withstand drops, impacts, and the rigors of daily use without breaking. Say goodbye to disposable styluses and hello to a pen that will serve you faithfully for years to come. Note-Taking on Remarkable 2 Pen or Kindle Scribe Pen and so on With the WIILGN pen,students and professionals can take clear, organized notes on tablets, erase mistakes quickly, and switch between writing and erasing seamlessly. Drawing and Sketching on Android Tablets Artists can use the stylus for digital drawing on Android devices, experimenting with strokes and erasing freely using the built-in eraser without switching tools. Editing Documents and Annotating PDFs Business professionals can annotate PDFs and edit documents with ease on Magnetic Pen, making meetings and presentations more eficient Daily Planning and Joumaling This pen is also qreat for personal use-whether you enioy jourmaling on a Remarkable or planning your day on a tablet the WIILGN pen ensures asmooth, paper-like writing experience. One of the standout features of stvlus Pen is its inovative rear-mounted eraser, No more switching tools or manwaly deleting strokes on-screen. simply flip the pen and erase effortlessly. Just like a classic pencil, you can flip the pen over and instantly corect mistakes on your touchscreen devices. The erasable feature provides a smooth workflow with minimal interruptions. This feature is particularly handy for artists, students, and professionals who need to quickly refine their work on digital canvases Magnetic Adsorption for Easy Storage This feature ensures that your pen stays in place, reducing the risk of loss or damage while on themove. The EMR stylus is not compatible with Apple devices. Stylus Pen*1/Pen Tip*5/Instruction Manual*1/Clip*1 One of the most frustrating aspects of using electronic accessories is dealing with breakages.Unlike traditional styluses, which can easily break under pressure, the WIILGN Stylus Pen is built to last. The break-resistant material ensures that the pen can handle frequent use and accidental drops. Zero-Lag Performance with Palm Rejection The WIILGN stylus provides a no-delay , continuous writing experience, making it feel as natural as writing with pen on paper . With palm rejection technology, you can comfortably rest your hand on the screen ensures a distraction-free experience, making it perfect for note-taking and sketching. Unmatched Precision with 0.04 Inch Replaceable Tip Featuring a tip of only 0.04‘’ (0.1 cm),Write as naturally as with a traditional pen,sketch with intricate detail,or annotate documents with ease. The ultra-fine tip of this pen gives you control over even the smallest strokes. When the tip wears out— simply swap in a new tip , making it a good choice. Who Will Benefit from the WIILGN Stylus Pen? Students For students who rely on tablets or e-ink devices like the Remarkable 2 for digital note-taking, this pen ofers a seamles, natural writing experience. The eraser feature is especially useful during class or study sessions when quick corections are needed. Additionally, the durable design ensures that it withstands the daily wear and tear of backpacks, libraries, and study spaces. Business Professionals and Office Workers Professional s who use Remarkable tablets or Kindle scribe for organizing tasks,scheduling meetings and annotating documents will appreciate the pen's precision and ease ofuse. The break-resistant feature that it can handle frequent travel andoffice use, while the maqnetic adsorption keeps it securely in place between meetings. Artists, Designers, and Architects Creative professionals will benefit from the stylus's high precision and zero-lag performance , making it ideal forsketching and digital artwork on tablets. With 4096 pressure sensitivity levels , users can draw thick and thin lines with ease, adding dimension to their work. The ergonomic grip makes long drawing sessions comfortable, and the erasable feature encourages experimentation without the fear of making mistakes. Teachers and Educators Teachers can use this stylus to mark assignments, write notes on tablets or e-readers , and annotate documents with easeThe erasable feature saves time by eliminating the need to switch tools when correcting mistakes, and the durable desion ensures it wilast throuohan entire school year. Broader Compatibility Range While other styluses may be limited to specific devices, the WllGN stylus offers universal compatibility. This pen smooth operation across multiple platforms. This WllGN Stylus Pen delivers unparalleled precision, comfort, and reliability across devices such as reMarkable 2/1 tablet, Kindle Scribe, Galaxy Book, Boox tab ultra c/x, Galaxy Tab S6/S7/S8 -a perfect tool for creators, note-takers, and professionals. Disclaimer: Compatibility varies depending on specifc model and software version. Always verify compatibility,prior to purchase.
